meta_description: Round, square, and rectangular tube sizes are available through Xometry's laser tube cutting and tube bending services. Search hundreds of stock items by different alloys, outer diameters, wall thicknesses, and more. Get an instant quote today.

sections.heading: Standard Tube Sizes
sections.text: Standard Tube Sizes Xometry offers instant pricing and lead times on custom tube fabrication services. These services include laser tube cutting and tube bending . The article outlines the standard round , square , and rectangular tube stock available through Xometry. Round Tube Square Tube Rectangular Tube Stainless Steel: 304 and 316 Welded and Seamless Aluminum 6061 Extruded and Drawn Alloy Steel 4130 Seamless Steel A513 DOM, HREW, and CREW

sections.heading: What Tube Sizes Does Xometry Offer for Bending and Cutting?
sections.text: What Tube Sizes Does Xometry Offer for Bending and Cutting? Xometry offers tube bending and laser tube cutting services via the Xometry Instant Quoting EngineÂ®. Simply upload a tube design to start your quote and get pricing and manufacturability feedback right away. Tube Bending Tube bending services through Xometry are for round tubes , and the information below outlines a comprehensive list of available alloys and sizes. Files uploaded near the standard size listed below will assume that standard size for fabrication. These quick design for manufacturing (DFM) tips will ensure your project will quickly quote and be made with ease: Minimum bendable tube diameter: .250" Maximum bendable t...

Simply upload a tube design to start your quote and get pricing and manufacturability feedback right away. sections.heading: Round Tube Stock
sections.text: Round Tube Stock Xometry uses a variety of round tube stock for its on-demand manufacturing services. The information below separates the metals and sizes by their availability for tube bending and laser tube cutting.

sections.heading: Stainless Steel Round Stock
sections.text: Stainless Steel Round Stock Stainless Steel Round Stock Stainless 304 and 316 tubes can be bent and cut in a variety of geometries. 304 is typically a general purpose stainless steel and 316 has increased corrosion resistance. Round Stainless Steel 304, Welded Round Stainless Steel 304, Seamless Round Stainless Steel 316, Welded Round Stainless Steel 316, Seamless

sections.heading: Aluminum Round Stock
sections.text: Aluminum Round Stock Aluminum is a lightweight and strong material used in a variety of applications, including frames, cable routing, structural bodies, and more. Round Aluminum 6061, Extruded Round Aluminum 6061, Drawn

sections.heading: Alloy Steel Round Stock
sections.text: Alloy Steel Round Stock Alloy steel tube has no shortage of uses, whether for handlebars, exhaust manifolds, construction, agriculture, or automotive applications. A513-5 DOM tubing has the largest list of available sizes in the category. Round Steel 4130, Seamless (Chromoly) Round Steel A513 Type 5, DOM DOM: Drawn Over Mandrel Round Steel A513 Type 1, HREW HREW: Hot Rolled Electric-Welded Round Steel A513 Type 2, CREW CREW: Cold Rolled Electric-Welded

sections.heading: Square and Rectangular Tubing
sections.text: Square and Rectangular Tubing Square and rectangular tubes can make large, cost-effective structural components at scale. The flat faces make this ideal for mechanical assemblies. These materials are available for Xometry's laser tube cutting service only.

sections.heading: Stainless Steel Square and Rectangular Stock
sections.text: Stainless Steel Square and Rectangular Stock Stainless square or rectangular tubes are used to fabricate strong and durable structures in a wide realm of industrial, processing, agricultural, and transportation applications. Square Stainless Steel 304, Welded Rectangle Stainless Steel 304, Welded Square Stainless Steel 316, Welded Rectangle Stainless Steel 316, Welded

sections.heading: Aluminum Square and Rectangular Stock
sections.text: Aluminum Square and Rectangular Stock Aluminum 6061 square or rectangular tubes are regularly used in Xometry's laser tube cutting services to build lightweight structural components for framing, overhead fixtures, brackets, shelving, and more. The information below outlines the available stock sizes for aluminum square and rectangular tubes. Square Aluminum 6061, Extruded Rectangle Aluminum 6061, Extruded

sections.heading: Alloy Steel Square and Rectangular Stock
sections.text: Alloy Steel Square and Rectangular Stock Alloy steel A513 and 4130 square or rectangular tubes are high-strength and robust options for demanding structural requirements. 4130 is also known as chromoly, and is formulated to have a superior strength-to-weight ratio. A513 tubing is used for shelving and automotive frames. Square Steel A513 Rectangle Steel A513 Square Steel 4130, Cold Drawn Seamless (Chromoly) Rectangle Steel 4130, Cold Drawn Seamless (Chromoly)
